scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.build:full: npm install && npm run build --workspace=shared && cd server && npx prisma generate && cd .. && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.build:prod: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
